title: Ancestors: The Humankind Odyssey
desc: A third-person open world survival game spanning 10 million years of human evolution.

title: Assassin's Creed Syndicate
desc: Take back Victorian London as twins Jacob and Evie Frye, building a criminal empire to fight the Templar stranglehold on the city.

title: Batman: Arkham Origins
desc: Set years before Arkham Asylum, this prequel follows a young Batman facing assassins on a bounty — including his first encounter with the Joker.

title: Bloodroots
desc: An ultraviolent action game where every object in the world is a weapon. A bloody ballet of improvisation and instinct.

title: Castle Story
desc: A creative voxel-based strategy game where you build castles one brick at a time and defend them from monsters.

title: Dead by Daylight
desc: Asymmetrical multiplayer horror where one Killer hunts four Survivors. A global phenomenon with tens of millions of players.

title: Deceive Inc.
desc: Go undercover as a world-class spy in this tense multiplayer game of subterfuge. Disguise, deceive, and eliminate.

title: Deus Ex GO
desc: A turn-based puzzle infiltration game set in a stylised Deus Ex universe, placing Agent Jensen in covert missions solved through strategy.

title: Deus Ex: Human Revolution
desc: A groundbreaking action-RPG set in cyberpunk 2027, where augmented security expert Adam Jensen investigates a conspiracy that could change humanity forever.

title: Deus Ex: Mankind Divided
desc: Two years after Human Revolution, Adam Jensen navigates a world of augmentation apartheid to uncover a deeper, world-threatening conspiracy.

title: Epic Manager
desc: A unique mashup of sports management simulation and classic JRPGs — recruit heroes, build a team, and compete in adventurers' leagues.

title: Far Cry 4
desc: Stranded in the fictional Himalayan kingdom of Kyrat, you must navigate a civil war and the eccentric cruelty of self-appointed king Pagan Min.

title: Foundation
desc: A grid-less sprawling medieval city builder with organic development and monument construction.

title: Hellpoint
desc: A dark multiplayer action RPG set in the aftermath of a quantum cataclysm aboard a space station orbiting a black hole, filled with occult horrors.

title: Hitman GO
desc: A turn-based puzzle game where Agent 47 navigates elegant diorama-style set pieces on a grid — strategy and precision over brute force.

title: Hitman: Sniper
desc: Take on contracts as Agent 47 armed only with a sniper rifle, using creativity and precision from a fixed vantage point to eliminate targets.

title: Jotun: Valhalla Edition
desc: Hand-drawn action-exploration set in Norse mythology. Play Thora, a Viking warrior who must prove herself to the gods.

title: Knight Squad 2
desc: An 8-player arcade multiplayer mixing Bomberman with Gauntlet across 13 chaotic game modes.

title: Lara Croft GO
desc: A turn-based puzzle-adventure set in a long-forgotten world. Navigate treacherous labyrinths and solve ancient mysteries as Lara Croft.

title: Legends of Ethernal
desc: A 2D action-adventure with hand-crafted environments, clever puzzles, and a rich world to explore as you search for your missing parents.

title: Outlast
desc: A true survival horror experience set in a remote psychiatric hospital, where your only option is to run and hide.

title: Outward
desc: An open-world RPG with punishing survival elements — cold nights, harsh weather, and a world that doesn't care if you live.

title: Prison Boss VR
desc: A VR crafting and trading game where your play space becomes a jail cell. Craft contraband, build a reputation, and don't get caught by the guards.

title: Rise of Madness
desc: A zombie survival game set in 1840 Montréal. Manage a desperate community, build shelter, scavenge resources, and search for a cure.

title: Sea of Stars
desc: A BAFTA-winning turn-based RPG inspired by 90s classics, blending stunning pixel art with tactical combat.

title: SEASON: A Letter to the Future
desc: A young woman leaves her secluded village to document a world on the cusp of an apocalypse.

title: Ship of Fools
desc: A cooperative roguelite set in a marine universe. Two Fools aboard a ship, braving the Everlasting Storm.

title: Spiritfarer
desc: A cozy management game about dying. Build a boat, explore the world, and help spirits pass on in this emotional masterpiece.

title: Stories: The Path of Destinies
desc: An action-RPG in a fairytale world of rebels and sky-pirates where every choice branches the story — play all paths to uncover the true ending.

title: Subaeria
desc: An intense action puzzler with roguelike elements. Use your wits to manipulate enemies into destroying each other.

title: The Messenger
desc: A side-scrolling action platformer about a ninja carrying a scroll through a cursed world, shifting between 8-bit and 16-bit eras.

title: Therian Saga
desc: A rich browser-based MMORPG that stands apart from the crowd, offering deep crafting systems, trade networks, and a living world to explore.

title: Ultimate Chicken Horse
desc: A party platformer where you build the level as you play, placing traps to stop your friends.

title: We Happy Few
desc: Survival action set in a drug-fuelled, darkly comic alternate 1960s England where conformity is enforced at all costs.

title: Zombiotik
desc: A chaotic 3D local multiplayer game for up to 8 players based on zombie tag — the last human standing wins.
